hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -qE '/dist/' && { echo 'Blocked: dist/ is build output (rslib wipes it on rebuild). Edit the source + rebuild instead.' >&2; exit 2; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[;&|({])[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+(-[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]+([^-][^[:space:]]*[[:space:]]+)?)*(commit|push)([[:space:]);&|]|$)' && { echo 'Blocked: in this repo the user handles all git commits and pushes themselves. Leave changes staged or unstaged for them.' >&2; exit 2; } || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && pnpm biome check --write --files-ignore-unknown=true "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *packages/plugins/*.tsx|*packages/canvas/*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in *__tests__*|*.test.tsx|*.spec.tsx) exit 0;; esac; grep -qE '</[A-Za-z]|/>|<>' "$f" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -qE '^import[[:space:]]+(\*[[:space:]]+as[[:space:]]+)?React([[:space:]]|,)' "$f" && { echo 'WARN: JSX but no React binding in' "$f" '— this package builds CLASSIC JSX (React.createElement); dist throws "React is not defined" at runtime and typecheck will not catch it. Add: import * as React from "react";' >&2; exit 2; } || true
